name: Yo fui un asesino: el crimen de la catana
original_name: Yo fui un asesino: el crimen de la catana
overview: José Rabadán killed his both of his parents and his little sister with a katana when he was just 16-years-old. Seventeen years later, he is completely reintegrated into society and speaks out for the first time.

trailers.title: ¿Qué fue del asesino de la catana? | Yo fui un asesino
'Yo fui un asesino', llega este mes a DMax,  sobre el crimen de la catana
